zh.lifeSummary: 當Cécile de Rodez於1278年出生在法國艾維倫羅德茲時，她的父親comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez43歲，母親Mascarose de Comminges19歲。她於1298年與Bernard d'Armagnac在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1313年3月22日在法國奧其坦尼格斯奧享年35歲，埋葬在法國艾維倫羅德茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cécile de Rodez于1278年出生在法国艾維倫羅德茲时，她的父亲comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez43岁，母亲Mascarose de Comminges19岁。她于1298年与Bernard d'Armagnac在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1313年3月22日在法国奧其坦尼格斯奧享年35岁，埋葬在法国艾維倫羅德茲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rodez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

variants.name: Rudes
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Roda
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Arturo, Francisco, Domingos, Manuel, Mario, Alfredo, Amandio, Andres, Angel, Eduardo, Elia, Gustavo, Joaquim.

Catalan: habitational name from any of various places called Roda, for example Roda de Ter, Roda de Berà, Roda de Ribagorça, from Catalan roda ‘wheel’ (from Latin rota), possibly denoting a waterwheel.
German: habitational name from any of numerous places, particularly in central eastern Germany, named Roda or Rhoda.

variants.name: Rodas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Jorge, Juan, Ana, Jaime, Rafael, Elvira, Manuel, Miguel, Raul.
Galician and Portuguese: habitational name from any of the three places in Galicia, Spain, named Rodas (in Lugo, Ourense, and Pontevedra provinces), from the plural of roda ‘wheel’.

nameMeanings.name: Cécile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Cecily  , now also quite common in the English-speaking world (usually without the accent). The form   Cecile   is found in 14th‐century English records.

en.lifeSummary: When Cécile de Rodez was born in 1278, in Rodez, Aveyron, France, her father, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, was 43 and her mother, Mascarose de Comminges, was 19. She married Bernard d'Armagnac in 1298, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 22 March 1313, in Auch, Gers, Occitanie, France, at the age of 35, and was buried in Rodez, Aveyron, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cécile de Rodez est née en 1278, à Rodez, Aveyron, France, son père, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mascarose de Comminges, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Bernard d'Armagnac en 1298, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1313, à Auch, Gers, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Rodez, Aveyron, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cécile de Rodez 1278 in Rodez, Aveyron, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez 43 und ihre Mutter Mascarose de Comminges 19. Sie hat 1298 in Frankreich Bernard d'Armagnac geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. März 1313 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Auch, Gers, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Rodez, Aveyron, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cécile de Rodez è nata il nel 1278 nel Rodez, Aveyron, Francia, sua padre, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Mascarose de Comminges, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Bernard d'Armagnac nel 1298, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1313, nel Auch, Gers, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a Rodez, Aveyron, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Cécile de Rodezが1278年にフランスエイビーロンロデズで生まれた時，父comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodezは43歳，母Mascarose de Commingesは19歳であった。1298年にフランスでBernard d'Armagnacと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1313年3月22日にフランスオクシタニージャーズアウチで35歳で死去し，フランスエイビーロンロデズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cécile de Rodez(이)가 1278년 프랑스 에비런 로데즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mascarose de Comminges(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1298년 프랑스에서 Bernard d'Armagnac(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 3월 22일 프랑스 옥시탠이 그르스 오치에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 에비런 로데즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cécile de Rodez nasceu em 1278, em Rodez, Aveyron, França, seu pai, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mascarose de Comminges, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Bernard d'Armagnac em 1298, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de março de 1313, em Auch, Gers, Occitanie, França, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Rodez, Aveyron, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cécile de Rodez родилась в 1278 г. в местности родез, авирон, Франция, её отцу по имени comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mascarose de Comminges, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bernard d'Armagnac в 1298 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 марта 1313 г. в местности ауч, джирс, окситани, Франция в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности родез, авирон, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cécile de Rodez nació en 1278, en Rodez, Aveyron, Francia, su papá, comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Mascarose de Comminges, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Bernard d'Armagnac en 1298, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1313, en Auch, Gers, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en Rodez, Aveyron, Francia.
